title: cytisus longissimus
intro: Cytisus longissimus, also known as the 'Italian Spotted Broom', is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Cytisus longissimus is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual tolerance.
